title: Navigational Warning Reception
description: Receive a SECURITE navigational warning broadcast and acknowledge it correctly.
task: Listen to the SECURITE broadcast from Anytown Radio on Channel 16. Acknowledge that you have received the navigational warning.
scriptReference: {{stationName}}, THIS IS {{vesselName}}, RECEIVED YOUR SECURITE, OVER

scriptedResponses.speaker: COAST_STATION
scriptedResponses.text: SECURITE SECURITE SECURITE. ALL STATIONS ALL STATIONS ALL STATIONS. THIS IS ANYTOWN RADIO. NAVIGATIONAL WARNING. UNLIT BUOY IN POSITION FIVE ZERO DEGREES ONE ZERO MINUTES NORTH, ZERO ZERO ONE DEGREES TWO FIVE MINUTES WEST. MARINERS ARE ADVISED TO NAVIGATE WITH CAUTION. OUT.

scriptedResponses.speaker: COAST_STATION
scriptedResponses.text: BLUE DUCK, THIS IS ANYTOWN RADIO, ROGER, OUT.

hints: Listen carefully to the SECURITE broadcast
Note the nature and position of the warning
Acknowledge by calling the station and confirming receipt
